betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The universal call of entropy, that disorder will, sooner or later, win over one's life. Death.
And its opposite. Transience, creative chaos. Uniqueness. Order.
For one to exist, to possess meaning, the other must as well. Each needs its nemesis.
The call to Trinitas, it is a call to restore this balance. To bring virtue into my Mission. To answer the call of Love.
The highest among the Realmshifters, who have been not-so-obvious companions all throughout my journey, they are the ones who are now calling me, to Trinitas.
The world where Alchemy was born, and where those in power decide to give their gift to those they wish. Not because they are better than others, but because they serve a higher purpose. To propagate Love.
I said 'those in power'. Well, it is not really true, but I have no other words to express what they are. The nature of Trinitas is one of Love, and true Love is one that embraces the other in all their freedom. Because of this, there is no rule. Just leading by example, knowing that it is up to another's freedom to follow, or to go another way.
It is this Love that has trusted upon me the attunement to Mithril, as I was getting my footing on Terra. Love so strong that it did not even ask me to do anything with the power I was given. But it is this power that has brought me here, and I cannot help but think that, out of all the prophecies I have been part of, it is this one that I find the most astonishing. No words, no reference, and yet, I made it here.
To Trinitas, the world of the Fractallites of Love, where I shall give back the love I was given, where I shall return Terra its ruler.
